# AppClipDefaultExperienceCreateRequest.Data.Relationships.AppClip

**Object**

The relationship to the App Clips resource you set with the request that creates a Default App Clip Experiences resource.

## Declaration

```swift
object AppClipDefaultExperienceCreateRequest.Data.Relationships.AppClip
```

## Objects

- **AppClipDefaultExperienceCreateRequest.Data.Relationships.AppClip.Data**: The type and ID of the App Clips resource that you’re relating with the Default App Clip Experiences resource you’re creating.

## Objects

- **AppClipDefaultExperienceCreateRequest.Data.Relationships.AppClipDefaultExperienceTemplate**: The relationship to the Default App Clip Experience Templates resource you set with the request that creates a Default App Clip Experiences resource.
- **AppClipDefaultExperienceCreateRequest.Data.Relationships.ReleaseWithAppStoreVersion**: The relationship to the App Store Versions resource you set with the request that creates a Default App Clip Experiences resource.
